_comment: Spoon stirring a bowl of soup. Closed circular bowl (no-slip wall); a rigid blade swept once about the centre with a QUADRATIC speed profile (0->peak->0) through a long 240-degree stroke (~3x the travel of the original demo). DG incompressible Navier-Stokes; the blade no-slip is imposed by a SEMI-IMPLICIT (IMEX) immersed-boundary CONSTRAINT (Lagrange-multiplier Schur solve reusing the velocity Helmholtz factorization, unconditionally stable in the constraint strength). Mesh adaptively refined around the spoon's swept path. [IB-OSCILLATION FIX (2026-06-15): coarse 2h markers + Wendland-C2 volume kernel (well-conditioned, smooth, M3/M4) + constraint<->projection reprojection (divergence, M1). AV REMOVED: the diffusion-residual sensor caused an iatrogenic checkerboard (positive-feedback from per-element blend discontinuity). R1+R2 alone are sufficient. See docs/spoon-ib-oscillation-fix.md.]
